# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GITLAB_TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}

before_script:
  - echo "Validating input..."
  - if [[ -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" || -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]]; then echo "Merge request title or description is missing"; exit 1; fi

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the project..."
    - echo "Merge Request Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Merge Request Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying the application..."
    - echo "Deploying feature: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Creating deployment tag..."
    - git tag "deploy-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE// /-}"
    - git push origin "deploy-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE// /-}"
  only:
    - merge_requests
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://your-production-url.com
  when: manual

secrets:
  GITLAB_TOKEN:
    value: ${GITLAB_TOKEN}
    protected: true
    masked: true
